regional_cost_note: Builders in Dunedin typically charge $65–$85/hr for residential labour, reflecting Otago's competitive tradie market. New builds average $2,500–$3,200/m² for quality construction. Heritage renovations in Dunedin's hill suburbs can carry a 20–30% premium for specialist skills. Always get 3 fixed-price quotes.

businesses.name: SB2 Build
businesses.known_for: Hands-on residential new builds and renovations across Dunedin and greater Otago, praised for direct communication and staying on budget.

businesses.name: BuildSmart
businesses.known_for: Certified Builder specialists in renovations, new builds, and investment property development; fixed-price contracts standard.

businesses.name: Next Level Building & Construction
businesses.known_for: Bathroom renovations, home extensions, and complex alterations across Dunedin; 50+ years combined team experience.

businesses.name: Jeffrey Dennison Builders
businesses.known_for: Master Builder since 2016 covering residential and light commercial projects from Oamaru to Timaru with a reputation for precision.

businesses.name: G.J. Gardner Homes Dunedin
businesses.known_for: Fixed-price new home builds for Dunedin and Otago, backed by a national guarantee and strong trade supplier network.

businesses.name: Richard Hendry Builders Ltd
businesses.known_for: Over 20 years of Dunedin residential building experience; strong word-of-mouth reputation and high NoCowboys rating.

businesses.name: Better Built Homes
businesses.known_for: Design-and-build specialists in Pine Hill; Master Builders member with 8+ years creating functional, quality homes.

businesses.name: Wilson Builders
